title: boehmeria platyphylla subvar. sumatrana
intro: Boehmeria platyphylla subvar. sumatrana, also known as Sumatran nettle tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae, characterized by its nettle-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boehmeria platyphylla subvar. sumatrana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
